title: Token name style
description: Case used for generated Swift symbol names.

title: Token name structure
description: Control which parts are included in the exported token name.

pathAndName.label: Path + Name
pathAndName.description: Include group path and name (e.g. buttonPrimaryBackground)

title: Global prefix
description: Prefix prepended to every generated symbol name.

title: Customize type prefixes
description: Apply a per-type prefix to each generated symbol name.

title: Token prefixes
description: Each token of a specific type is prefixed with the following identifier.

title: Numeric precision
description: Maximum number of decimals used for numeric and color values.

title: Use token references
description: Values reference other tokens where a token is a full alias of another.

title: Theme export format
description: Control how selected themes are exported.

separateFiles.label: Separate files per theme
separateFiles.description: Generate a separate set of files for each selected theme

applyDirectly.label: Apply themes directly
applyDirectly.description: Apply selected themes directly to token values

mergedTheme.label: Merged theme files
mergedTheme.description: Generate one themed set of files with all themes applied together

title: Export base values
description: Base (non-themed) files are exported alongside theme files.

title: Export only themed tokens
description: Theme files only include tokens whose value differs from the base value.

title: Path to generated files
description: All files are written to this directory relative to the export root.

title: Generate empty files
description: Generate empty files instead of omitting types with no tokens.

title: Show token descriptions
description: Render the token description as a Swift doc comment for every token.

title: Show file disclaimer
description: A message noting the file was generated automatically appears in every file.

default:
This file was generated automatically by Supernova.io and should not be changed manually.
To modify the format or content of this file, please contact your design system team.
title: Disclaimer message
description: The disclaimer rendered at the top of every generated file.

title: Indentation
description: Number of spaces used to indent generated declarations.

title: Dark theme name
description: Name of the theme whose values become the dark appearance of generated colorsets. Matched case-insensitively against each theme's code name or name.

title: Color asset catalog name
description: Name of the generated Xcode asset catalog that holds all color colorsets.

title: Semantic color group name
description: Only color tokens whose top-level group name matches this value (case-insensitively) are exported as colorsets. Primitive colors outside this group are dropped.
